# Judge Mode

Track: Undergraduate
Overall judge readiness: 94/100
Decision delta: +29
Risk reduction: 71%

## Rubric Fit

| Weight | Dimension | Score | Evidence |
|---:|---|---:|---|
| 20% | Problem Understanding | 95 | Student persona, constraints, goals and non-goals are visible. |
| 30% | AI/Analytics Reasoning | 96 | Transparent scoring, skill gaps, counterfactual slider and baseline comparison. |
| 25% | Solution Design & Architecture | 94 | Evidence graph, V core, Vue demo, WAIBAv submission gates. |
| 15% | Impact & Decision Value | 92 | Four-week plan, portfolio artifact and opportunity shortlist. |
| 10% | Responsible AI & Ethics | 98 | Guardrails, human approval, synthetic data and no-guarantee language. |

## Baseline Versus Coach

| Student | Baseline | Coach | Risk Before | Risk After | Winning Signal |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|
| First-year undecided student | 54 | 86 | 7 | 2 | Turns broad interest into an evidence-producing portfolio sprint. |
| Scholarship-focused builder | 61 | 88 | 6 | 2 | Replaces unsupported claims with artifact, rubric and review gates. |
| Internship path switcher | 58 | 84 | 8 | 3 | Shows which skill gap blocks the next opportunity and how to prove progress. |
| Privacy-conscious student | 49 | 82 | 9 | 2 | Keeps identity proof private while still producing judge-ready evidence. |
| Research club lead | 66 | 91 | 5 | 1 | Converts team ambiguity into architecture, data and responsible AI receipts. |

## Killer Demo Beats

- Move a skill slider and show the recommendation/risk explanation changing live.
- Open the evidence graph: input, reasoning, output, human gate and receipt.
- Show baseline-vs-coach: the coach improves decision clarity while reducing risky claims.
- End on Devpost packet readiness with final submit still gated to the student lead.
